subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Verily, Ḥusayn doth make mention of thee, and he speaketh the truth betwixt earth and heaven, and calleth all unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین ان الحسین یذکرک و انه ینطق بالحق بین الارض و السماء و یدع الکل الی
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
